title: Investigation: Best for Britain
text:
Subject: Best for Britain

Investigated for: Failure to return an impermissible donation of £50,000 within 30 days of receipt

Decision: Two offences were found A £900 Variable Monetary Penalty imposed, which was paid on 9 December

Summary of reasons: The £50,000 impermissible donation was voluntarily returned by the campaigner, although after the 30-day deadline. A sanction was considered appropriate and proportionate in this case in line with our Enforcement Policy
